name: independent accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For independent accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual invoice processing causes late payments. We automate accounts payable and receivable instead of manual tracking and processing of invoices.
problem_solved: manual invoice processing leads to late payments
